title: Spicy Cheese Toast
description: A simple, comforting snack that combines gooey cheese with spicy kick on toasted bread.
instructions: 1. Preheat your toaster or toaster oven to 350°F (180°C).
2. Butter one side of each bread slice, if using.
3. Place the bread slices in the toaster or toaster oven and toast until lightly browned.
4. Spread a layer of spicy spread on top of each toasted bread slice.
5. Place one or two slices of cheese on top of the spicy spread.
6. Return the toast to the toaster oven and melt the cheese until gooey.
7. Remove the toast from the oven and let cool for a minute or two.
